title: Skeleton Parts Pack! MPM Addon
description: An addon for Noppes More Player Models
body:
This resource pack serves as an addon is for 
[Noppes More Player Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models) adding the following within their own contained section of the gui
- Skeleton Heads, with or without eyes included (Seperate part for colorable eyes included).
- A simple skeleton torso.
- Skeleton Arms, featuring the options for either one of your arms or both.
- Skeleton Legs, featuring the options for either one of your legs or both.

[Noppes More Player Models](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models)
